summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GERdoctor iteration 15 features. All new desktop User Dashboard changes are working correctly: progress bar moved INSIDE each tile, step titles FULLY visible with whitespace-nowrap (no truncation), horizontal scrolling works with min-w-max container, and staggered animation delays create continuous bar illusion. Mobile accordion view unchanged and working correctly.
passed_tests: User Dashboard desktop: All 8 step titles FULLY visible - no text truncation or ellipsis

User Dashboard desktop: Titles verified: Persönliche Daten, Service Antragstellung, Meilenstein Antragstellung, FaMed, Service Kenntnisprüfung, Meilenstein Kenntnisprüfung, Service Weiterbildung, Meilenstein Job finden
User Dashboard desktop: Progress bar is INSIDE each tile at the top (8/8 tiles verified)
User Dashboard desktop: Progress bar staggered animation - delays from 0s to 0.7s, durations from 0.8s to 1.85s
User Dashboard desktop: Container has overflow-x-auto wrapper and min-w-max flex container
User Dashboard desktop: Horizontal scrolling works at 1024px (scrollWidth=1750, clientWidth=958)
User Dashboard desktop: Last steps (7 & 8) visible when scrolled right
User Dashboard desktop: All titles have whitespace-nowrap CSS property
User Dashboard desktop: Step click navigation works - Step 1 highlighted correctly
User Dashboard desktop: Step 8 clickable after scrolling
User Dashboard mobile (390px): Accordion layout with 8 step containers
User Dashboard mobile: Vertical progress line found with data-testid
User Dashboard mobile: All 8 step titles fully visible in accordion headers
User Dashboard mobile: Form fields render correctly (10 fields found)
User Dashboard mobile: Save Progress button visible and clickable
User Dashboard mobile: Complete & Continue button visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 changed the desktop User Dashboard step tiles: progress bar moved from unified bar at top to INSIDE each tile button, titles use whitespace-nowrap for no truncation, container uses min-w-max with overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling, staggered animation delays (0s, 0.1s, 0.2s... 0.7s) with increasing durations (0.8s to 1.85s) create illusion of one continuous bar. Mobile accordion view unchanged from iteration 14. All features working correctly.
screenshots: .screenshots/desktop_step_tiles.png - Desktop dashboard showing step tiles with progress bars inside
.screenshots/desktop_1024_after_scroll.png - Desktop at 1024px after scrolling showing steps 5-8
.screenshots/mobile_form_buttons.png - Mobile form with Save Progress and Complete buttons
